title: crystals-per-second
description: A fabric mod that tells you how many end crystals per second you are placing / breaking!
body:
> Crystal Speed Counter

A simple fabric mod that allows you to see how many crystals per second you are breaking.
Great for crystal pvp!

> Usuage

```/counterconfig``` opens up the config menu, in there you will find two buttons, one for color and one for positioning.

> Positioning of the speed display

When in the ```config menu``` [/counteconfig], click on the ```position button``` and ```click anywhere``` on your screen with your mouse, this is where your current crystal speed will be rendered.

> Color of the speed display

When you are in the ```config menu``` [/counterconfig], click on color and ```enter some valid RGBA integer```. Default is some value of orange (I think)
